name: worktrace-ai-vscode-extension
description: Captures active VS Code and Cursor editor context metadata for the local WorkTrace AI desktop bridge.

worktrace.editorTracking.enabled.description: Capture active editor context metadata for WorkTrace AI.

worktrace.editorTracking.includeContentH.description: Hash active editor contents for deduplication without storing contents.

worktrace.editorTracking.batchDelayMs.description: Delay before sending a partially filled editor context batch.

worktrace.editorTracking.maxBatchSize.description: Maximum editor context events per bridge batch.

worktrace.editorTracking.maxQueueSize.description: Maximum queued editor context events before oldest events are dropped.

worktrace.editorTracking.bridgeCommand.description: Optional native host or desktop bridge command. When empty, events are written to bridgeFile as JSON lines.

worktrace.editorTracking.bridgeFile.description: Fallback desktop bridge JSONL file used when bridgeCommand is not configured.

worktrace.editorTracking.bridgeTimeoutMs.description: Timeout for native bridge command responses.

scripts.check: node --check src/context.js && node --check src/bridge.js && node --check src/batching.js && node --check src/extension.js
